message:
feat(acp,login): respect configured default model in ACP and generalize API-key login to metadata-backed providers

ACP model selection (acp.rs, +199 lines):
- Add select_acp_model_entry() that respects config.default_provider
  and config.default_model with provider alias matching instead of
  blindly picking the first available model entry
- Extract resolve_acp_thinking_level() defaulting to XHigh instead of
  Off for reasoning-capable models
- ~100 lines of tests verifying provider/model selection priority

Generic API-key login (commands.rs, +173 lines):
- Generalize API key login to metadata-backed providers (OpenRouter,
  Cohere, etc.) via PROVIDER_METADATA auto-discovery
- BUILTIN_LOGIN_PROVIDERS shrinks from 9 to 7 as openai/google move
  to the generic metadata-backed path
- /login provider listing now auto-discovers API-key providers
- Thinking level reads from branch-local state

TUI tests (tui_state.rs):
- Login listing assertions now include cohere/openrouter
- New test for generic API key guidance display

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
